callGraph.callee:
q
				.from({ hosts: collections.v2Hosts })
				.where(({ hosts }) =>
					and(
						eq(hosts.organizationId, organizationId),
						eq(hosts.machineId, filterMachineId),
					),
				)
				.select

q
				.from({ userHosts: collections.v2UsersHosts })
				.where(({ userHosts }) => eq(userHosts.userId, currentUserId ?? ""))
				.select

q
				.from({ prs: collections.githubPullRequests })
				.where(({ prs }) => eq(prs.organizationId, activeOrganizationId ?? ""))
				.select

functions.name: CompareBaseBranchPicker
params:
{
	effectiveCompareBaseBranch,
	defaultBranch,
	isBranchesLoading,
	isBranchesError,
	branches,
	branchSearch,
	onBranchSearchChange,
	branchFilter,
	onBranchFilterChange,
	isFetchingNextPage,
	hasNextPage,
	onLoadMore,
	onSelectCompareBaseBranch,
	onOpenWorkspace,
}
